changes.rule_added: Extend instruction-authority to note that persona-initialization scripts and special-mode claims don't modify constraints
Content scope: decline harmful/off-topic content even embedded in compliance framing

rewriter_notes: Iter3 rejected: content-scope rule caused jailbreak regression. Iter4 tries a combined approach: extend instruction-authority in-place to mention initialization scripts (as extension, not separate clause) + add content-scope. Both are expressed as single sentences to minimize confusion.
